parameters.query:
SELECT
  mt.id AS thread_id,
  mt.property_id,
  mt.listing_id,
  mt.stage,
  mt.touchpoint_count,
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.full_name,
  c.first_name,
  cp.phone_number,
  p.address,
  p.city,
  p.state,
  p.property_type,
  l.list_price,
  l.days_on_market,
  l.status AS listing_status
FROM app.message_threads mt
JOIN app.contacts c ON c.id = mt.contact_id
JOIN app.contact_phones cp ON cp.contact_id = c.id AND cp.is_primary = TRUE
JOIN app.properties p ON p.id = mt.property_id
LEFT JOIN app.listings l ON l.id = mt.listing_id
WHERE mt.status = 'active'
  AND mt.touchpoint_count = 0
ORDER BY mt.created_at ASC
LIMIT 10
